crime.value: Murder under Brooklyn bridge, potentially connected to serial killer Anna's escape demands
crime.quote: Then back at the crime scene detective sapphire AKA Kim and candleston drove to the crime scene under the Brooklyn bridge

closed_world.value: Police investigation constrained by 48-hour deadline and Anna's hostage situation
closed_world.quote: You got forty eight hours to let me go and put the actual criminal behind bars or watch you and your partner's family

culprit_and_motive.value: Potentially connected to someone working with Anna, motive unclear but involves forcing Anna's release
culprit_and_motive.quote: Something tells me this thing is not working alone

investigator.value: Detective Macy, primary investigator working with Detective Mason and Kim/Sapphire
investigator.quote: Macy Watched The Eleven o Clock news at night before she goes to bed. She was finally happy in capturing Anna

suspect_architecture.value: Multiple suspects with family connections: Ana (serial killer), Ashley (evidence thief with knife obsession), Sam (Ashley's mother with hunting knife collection), unnamed brother (knife collector). Each has different means/motives relating to knives and violence.
suspect_architecture.quote: My brother collects knives i borrow them just in case i have to kill a deer

red_herring.value: Ashley's knife theft from crime scene presented as evidence tampering but revealed as trauma response to mother's knife obsession rather than criminal conspiracy.
red_herring.quote: I took the hunting knife from the crime scene cause it reminns me of my mother who was addicted to knives

clue_fairness.value: Limited fairness - confession described as 'clue' form but actual clue content not revealed to reader when available to investigators.
clue_fairness.quote: We got a confession but it's in a form of a clue

social_world.value: Police hierarchy and legal system power dynamics - detectives vs. high-powered defense attorney Sophia Santiago who 'won millions of cases and gives you the best deal possible'.
social_world.quote: she won millions of cases and gives you the best deal possible

alibi.value: Sam's alibi for knife possession - claims hunting use borrowed from brother's collection rather than criminal intent.
alibi.quote: My brother collects knives i borrow them just in case i have to kill a deer

media_and_audience.value: Live-streamed hostage situation broadcast on TV creating public pressure and 48-hour deadline for investigators.
media_and_audience.quote: turn on the tv as she saw what appeared to be a live streaming security camera with a family in a cell

investigator_wound.value: Macy's personal history with Ana ('you known me macy since i was five years old') creates emotional vulnerability and family hostage leverage.
investigator_wound.quote: you known me macy since i was five years old that i don't play

_meta.title: ebook terrex corbin who is mr code
